judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly counting reviews by 2016-registrant users, the agent mapped 26 business_ref IDs to business IDs but only retrieved 5 matching documents from the business collection and then aggregated categories using just those 5 descriptions, leading to an incomplete and incorrect top-5 list.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly aggregating review counts for 2016-registrant users, the agent heuristically parsed categories from the free-text business.description using ad-hoc regex rules in execute_python (var_function-call-16268181922780412941), which misparsed/over- or under-counted categories (e.g., elevating "Automotive" over "Shopping"), leading to an incorrect top 5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After aggregating reviews by business for users who registered in 2016, the agent only retrieved categories for 5 of 31 businesses from the business collection (var_function-call-15041652997040794365) and then computed category totals from this incomplete subset (var_function-call-6840942887415363595/var_function-call-16959431784873588538), yielding incorrect top categories.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the contributing SQL query (var_function-call-6423373186792015285), the agent filtered users by yelping_since LIKE '2016%' but never restricted review dates (r.date) to "since 2016", so it aggregated all reviews by those users regardless of time, leading to incorrect top categories.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly joined reviews by 2016-registered users (function-call-7918765920421337806) and retrieved matching business descriptions (function-call-9190861179560460242), but in the final parsing step (function-call-14489781172220445626) its regex missed description patterns like “offers a delightful mix of,” undercounting categories such as “Breakfast & Brunch” and thus returning “Local Services” instead of the ground-truth top 5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
